question: Integrate: ∫(x²+1)³ dx, ∫(3x)/(x²+1) dx, ∫(3x²)/(x²+1) dx.
answer: 1. Expand and integrate term-by-term or use substitution. 2. \( \frac{3}{2}\ln|x²+1| + C \). 3. \( 3x - 3\tan^{-1}x + C \).

question: Evaluate definite integrals: ∫₀⁴ 1/√(3t+4) dt, ∫₄^(e²−3) 1/(x−2) dx, ∫₀^π (1+sinθ) dθ.
Particle motion: position function (13), acceleration (14), displacement (15), direction changes (16), subintervals for left/right motion (17-18).
answer: 13. Integrate velocity. 14. \( a(t) = \frac{dv}{dt} \). 15. \( \int_{t_1}^{t_2} v(t)dt \). 16. Solve \( v(t) = 0 \). 17-18. Use sign analysis of \( v(t) \).

question: Evaluate integrals: ∫₀^(1/2) -8(1−rx)¹¹ dx, ∫₀¹ 16x/(x²+2)³ dx, ∫₂π/21^(π/7) 21sec(rx)tan(rx) dx, ∫₀^4π cos(sinx)cosx dx.
